title: dalbergia japonica
intro: Dalbergia japonica, also known as Japanese blackwood or Japanese rosewood, is a species of tree in the family Fabaceae. It is valued for its wood, which is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dalbergia japonica include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating digestive issues, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. Herbal preparations of Dalbergia japonica can be found in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is often used in combination with other herbs to make teas, tinctures, and infusions.
